name: Lemon Chicken #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts lightly with a mallet or rolling pin.
2. In a small bowl, combine cornstarch, salt, and pepper. Gradually blend in water and egg yolks.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a wok until it reaches 375°F. Dip the chicken breasts (one at a time) into the cornstarch-egg yolk mixture. Fry the breasts for two or three at a time until golden, about five minutes. Drain on absorbent paper and keep warm.
4. Cut each breast into pieces and arrange on serving plates. Sprinkle with sliced green onions.
5. Combine all sauce ingredients in a medium saucepan. Stir until blended. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sauce boils and thickens for about five minutes. Pour the sauce over the chicken.
Note: Remove skin from chicken breasts before cooking. Cut the breasts in half and discard bones.
